title: OCTŌ Morning Light Neroli + Lime + Basil | Scented Candle. Made with Essential Oils and Soy Wax 250ml
features: 100% pure and natural essential oils, no synthetic fragrance, no dye
100% Natural Soy Wax [Biodegradable, Eco-Friendly, Non-GMO, Pesticide Free, Phthalate Free, Not Tested on Animals]
Burns longer and cleaner than paraffin wax

SCENT: This neroli, lime, and basil candle combines bright citrus with peppery undertones to provide a new and exciting addition of freshness to any occasion. Not only it smells wonderful but also has an uplifting effect on the mind and body. This aromatherapy candle is the perfect addition to your morning routine!
description: Product Description Perfect morning scent to boost your energy and happiness This neroli, lime, and basil candle combines bright citrus with peppery undertones to provide a new and exciting addition of freshness to any occasion. Not only it smells wonderful but also has an uplifting effect on the mind and body. Bring nature into your home Naturally scented candles Octō candles are made from the finest soy wax, which burns cleaner and longer. Hand poured in small batches in South London. With a passion for candles and the cosy memories they evoke, Octō candles were born with the aim of creating natural, affordable and original candles. Rosemary essential oil is warm and energizing with an herbaceous aroma and a citrus-like undertone. The scent of the oil is basically citrus, yet fruity and sweet, with a warm spicy floral quality and is reminiscent of neroli as well as lavender oil. Midnight Breeze candle is a rich and powerful scent. Combining the sweet scents of rose geranium, the earthy shades of patchouli and woodsy Vetiver. This scented candle is reminiscent of long walks through Italian countryside. Wonderful blend of therapeutic-grade Rosemary, Sweet Orange and Sage essential oils. Melt stresses away.with uplifting Grapefruit and invigorating Sweet Fennel. Use it to create a calming atmosphere during a massage, a soak in the bath, or whenever you need some time away from the hustle of daily life.
